headline: Trump's Iran Oil War 💥🇮🇷 Sends US Inflation 🚀 to 3-Year High 4.2% 😱💸
text: US consumers 😩💦 are CRYING 😭🥲 over Trump's 🔥💣 Iran war strikes that just sent May CPI 📈 to a THICC 4.2% 🍑 – the HIGHEST since 2023! From 3.8% last month, it's the third month of PUMPING 📈😤, all thanks to ENERGY BILLS 💡⛽ going BRRRRR 😩💨 almost 25% higher YoY! Petrol alone JUMPED 🐸 from $2.98 on Feb 28 (Trump's strike day) to a PAINFUL $4.15 per gallon at the pump 🚗💸! Iran said 'NOPE 🚫' and SHUTTERED the Strait of Hormuz 🌊🚢, choking 20% of global oil like a bad OnlyFans sub 💦🔒! Gas, electric, plane tickets ✈️, medical care 🏥💉, and even Netflix binges 📺🍿 all got more EXPENSIVE 💸😭! Fed's 2% target? Absolutely YEETED 🚀❌! Now Kevin Warsh 🏦👨‍💼 faces his first rate-hike decision next week – economists say 'LOGICAL CONCLUSION 🍆📏' after last week's JOBS BLOWOUT 💥💼! Trump said he doesn't think about the cost of living 'even a little bit' 🤷‍♂️ while promising to 'cut inflation' on the 2024 campaign trail 🗳️🍔, but Americans might be heading to November midterms under STAGFLATION SHADOWS 🌑📉! Even if the war ENDS tomorrow, experts warn it could take till 2027 for Hormuz to flow SMOOTH like butter 🧈⏳! BLS dropping facts: recreation, comms, and personal care all SLAYING wallets 💸🔪! Stephen Brown says May's jump 'not enough ammo' for hawks 🦅 but Isaac Stell says hike is INEVITABLE like a bad crypto rugpull 🪙💀! Wall Street simps 🤡📱 now sweating 😰💦 over whether Warsh will CRANK rates from 3.5-3.75% or let inflation keep MOONING 🌕📈! Get ready for pricier everything – even your morning coffee ☕💸 feels the Iran energy SHOCKWAVE 🌊⚡!
